description_long: This is a classical acoustic guitar with a traditional hourglass-shaped wooden body and a dark brown finish. The guitar features a flat top with a visible sound hole, six strings running from the bridge to the headstock, and a black bridge with white pins. The neck is long and slender, leading to a headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, typical of classical guitars. The body has a smooth, glossy surface, and the back and sides appear to be made from the same wood as the top. The overall design is simple and elegant, with no visible brand markings or decorative inlays.
description: A classical acoustic guitar with a dark brown wooden body, six strings, and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: The back and side of the guitar body are visible, showing the smooth, curved wooden surface and the neck extending from the body.
description_view_1: The headstock and tuning pegs are prominent, with the strings clearly visible running down the neck toward the body.
description_view_2: The front of the guitar is shown, highlighting the sound hole, bridge, and all six strings.
description_view_3: A side profile of the guitar, emphasizing the thickness of the body and the straightness of the neck.
attribute_headstock_design: Classical style headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo, and a rectangular end.
